name: PER_MASS_LINE_FUT_UPDATES
description: Stores summary of changed attribute values of different entities.

columns.Name: MASS_ACTION_FUT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: MASS_ACTION_LINE_ID
columns.Comments: The mass action line id associated to the surrogate key id.

columns.Name: MASS_ACTION_HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: The mass action header id associated to one or more surrogate keys.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: The PersonId of the person whose attribute changes are stored.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: The enterprise id of the person.

columns.Name: SURROGATE_KEY_ID
columns.Comments: Surrogate key of the entity whose attribute changes are stored.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: SURROGATE_KEY_NAME
columns.Comments: Surrogate key name of the entity whose attribute changes are stored.

columns.Name: ENTITY_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the entity whose attribute changes are stored..

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE
columns.Comments: The name of the attribute whose changed are stored.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: The ActionOccurrenceId of the entity row whose attribute changes are stored.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_SEQUENCE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the order of different changes made during a day. The lowest value represents the earliest change in the day.

columns.Name: OLD_VALUE
columns.Comments: The old value of the attribute that has changes in the source entity row.

columns.Name: NEW_VALUE
columns.Comments: The new value of the attribute that has changes in the source entity row.

columns.Name: COPY_STATUS
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the copy of the update is done or not done.

columns.Name: DESTINATION_SURROGATE_KEY_ID
columns.Comments: Surrogate key of the entity into which the attribute change has to be copied.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
